summary: Iteration 30 - Tax Summary 2025 Fix & Manual Acquisition Entry. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend Manual Entry tab working correctly with orphan asset quick-fill buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Timestamp normalization fix in unified_tax_service.py working correctly - 2025 tax summary returns proper dict structure
Manual acquisition endpoints (POST, GET, DELETE) all working correctly
Orphan disposal summary correctly identifies 6 assets with shortfalls (USDC, ALGO, SOL, FLR, AXL, BCH)
Frontend Manual Entry tab displays orphan assets with quick-fill buttons as expected
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_FRONTEND and TEST_818208 manual acquisitions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 30 verified working. Manual acquisition feature allows users to add missing buy records to fix orphan disposals. 2025 tax summary returns proper dict structure with realized gains.

P0_2025_Tax_Summary.notes: Returns proper dict structure with summary, realized_gains. Shows $3,259.54 total realized gain for 2025 with 312 realized gains entries.

POST /api/exchanges/manual-acquisition.notes: Creates manual acquisition with proper validation. Returns tx_id, asset, amount, price_usd, total_usd, timestamp.

GET /api/exchanges/orphan-disposal-summa.notes: Returns 6 orphan assets (USDC, ALGO, SOL, FLR, AXL, BCH) with shortfall amounts and recommendations.

GET /api/exchanges/manual-acquisitions.notes: Returns list of manual acquisitions with count.

DELETE /api/exchanges/manual-acquisition.notes: Deletes manual acquisition. Returns 404 for non-existent tx_id.

Frontend_Manual_Entry_Tab.notes: AddDataModal shows Manual tab with orphan asset quick-fill buttons (USDC, ALGO, SOL, FLR, AXL, BCH). Form submission works correctly.
